product_type: Two Post Inground Lift - Order Verification Form

site_survey_fields.overhead_obstructions: yes or no, customer to specify

installation_requirements.power_to_lift: 60 PSI pneumatic air (for air locks) to be brought to back of mainside column
installation_requirements.concrete_floor_wider_base: 8" floor thickness for wider base version
installation_requirements.electrical_connection_note: Final electrical connection to local/national code is the responsibility of the electrical contractor. More than one point of connection may be required. Disconnect switches, lock-out/tag-outs, main fuses, and main power leads, etc., are not provided by Mohawk Resources Ltd.
installation_requirements.pneumatic_power_note: Pneumatic power is the responsibility of the mechanical contractor to the final designated point or points at the vehicle lift unless otherwise specified by architect
installation_requirements.construction_project_verification: If construction project, verify production time with Mohawk

specifications.revision: A - Initials requests added (09/16 by CHS)

features: WB represents wider base versions to accommodate thinner floors
optional_equipment: Low profile arms (reduce capacity to 20,000 lbs)
certifications: ALI/ETL ALCTV certification (note: some options may invalidate this)
safety_features: Disconnect switches required per electrical code
notes: WB represents wider base versions to accommodate thinner floors (see note 4)
Power to lift and 60 PSI pneumatic air (for air locks) to be brought to back of mainside column
Some option combinations are not available. Some options may invalidate ALI/ETL ALCTV certification of lift. Consult a Mohawk representative.
Final electrical connection to local/national code is the responsibility of the electrical contractor
Pneumatic power is the responsibility of the mechanical contractor
Standard lift requires 12" floor thickness; wider base version requires 8" floor thickness
After all specifications approved by customer, make copy and return signed form to Mohawk Resources Ltd.
All lift options checked for purchase must be listed on purchase order as separate line items
Low profile arms option reduces capacity to 20,000 lbs
This drawing has been reviewed and found to be acceptable to all customer's specifications indicated
